title: Accommodations Suggester
description: Generate practical accommodation ideas for IEP-team consideration.
template: Suggest 6-8 accommodation ideas for a student with this area of need: {areaOfNeed}, in this setting: {setting}, at {gradeLevel}. Group ideas by presentation, response, setting, and timing, and phrase each as a suggestion for IEP-team consideration. Never use a real student's name — write [Student] instead. This is a draft that requires review and approval by the full IEP team; do not make eligibility, placement, or disciplinary determinations.
